ddls:
CREATE TABLE "editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SQL Server edition */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the SQL Server edition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the SQL Server edition */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date when the SQL Server edition was released */,
  "end_of_support" TEXT /* The date when support for the SQL Server edition ends */,
  "price" TEXT /* The cost of the SQL Server edition */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the edition is the latest version */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the edition is popular among users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "technical_specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications and use cases for the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the feature */,
  "is_advanced" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the feature is considered advanced */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the feature is available in the free edition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the feature's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edition_features" (
  "edition_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition-feature relationship */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SQL Server edition */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feature is available in the edition */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the feature's availability in the edition */,
  "is_core_feature" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the feature is a core feature of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edition_features_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("edition_id") REFERENCES editions ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edition_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales representative, end-user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "company" TEXT /* The name of the user's company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "selected_editions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of selected edition IDs */,
  "comparison_name" TEXT /* A name given by the user to the comparison */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments added by the user for the comparison */,
  "is_saved" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the comparison is saved for future reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommended_edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended SQL Server edition */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "user_requirements" TEXT /* User's requirements that led to the recommendation */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user accepted the recommendation */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* The date for follow-up with the user regarding the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_edition_id") REFERENCES editions ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., comparison, recommendation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity, including any relevant data */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to perform the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the activity in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object defining the permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the role was created */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
